item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's because there are no -A instances in those images.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don't believe there are any -A individuals in the photos, as far as the labels go. There's just two -B instances.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You never described, mentioned, or explained why the -A people in the images used for the piece also have altered left eyes.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: so true, they also look similar to someone but idk who.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
why does the first image look like a youtuber duo

they look like they'd say "smash that like button" at me

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Definitely the type of dark work I expect to stumble across when I come on this site. It was interesting to see the takes of the more extreme sides of sins and virtues, as well as making my stomach slightly twist at the added notes. The writing on the added notes was also very human, making it all the more painful and well written.

Definite +1, good work!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
An interesting take on skips that deal with the SDS. I do feel there were one or two too many footnotes in the MC&D letter, and the tone seemed a bit odd in some places, but I think otherwise it's a good one.

+1.

This article made me thoroughly disturbed, and uncomfortable. It was written wonderfully, and this certainly isn't a subject matter that should be comforting to read about so my prior statement isn't meant to be a negative. Just like literally needed to get it off my chest after reading because it was a lot.

Thanks for an article that managed to really pull at my emotions. Have a +1.

item.title: Depravity and Indifference
item.content:encoded:
Hello there! This is a rewrite of SCP-138-ARC, as administered by the Rewrite Team. This is obviously quite a bit different than the original article, but should still be generally in-line with the canon established in the tale "Perfection" by Dr Gears.

Shout out to whoever looked this over in chat - it's been a while since I got crit on this so I can't remember everyone involved, but if you were I appreciate it, as always. Also special thanks to Modern_Erasmus with once again trusting me with a rewrite.

Lot going on here, and before anyone starts asking about this article's similarities to popular anime franchises yes, there are distinct inspirations there and yes, they were intentional. I would hope there is enough going on elsewhere in this article that it is thoroughly distinct from any other licensed properties.

Thanks again, and I hope you enjoy it!

– hide block
